ConditionTab.Label: Condition
ConditionTab.Heading: Activity condition
ConditionTab.Hint: Use JavaScript. The activity is available only when the script returns true.
ConditionTab.Variables: Available variables: activity, activityType, item, actor, user, usage, dialog, message, rollData, source, getProperty, hasProperty, deepClone, game.
ConditionTab.WarningHint: Shown when the condition returns false. Leave blank to use the default warning.
ConditionTab.WarningTooltip: Optional. If left blank, Conditional Activities uses the default warning text.
ConditionTab.WarningPlaceholder: Example: You must be raging to use this ability.
ConditionTab.BadgeHint: Single-line label shown on locked activities. Leave blank to use the default badge.
ConditionTab.BadgeTooltip: Optional. Maximum 36 characters. If left blank, Conditional Activities uses the default badge label.

Notifications.ConditionError: This activity's condition could not be evaluated.
